utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Yeah , she was bald , she is not now .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: How could you not tell me that she has hair ?

emotion_cause.span: 3_you not tell me that she has hair

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I do not know , I hardly ever say that about people .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Ohh , well , this is just perfect !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well I am sorry , I thought you said it was okay .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , I said what was okay when I thought she was some weird bald chick . I mean , you know , that girl has got hair all over her head !

emotion_cause.span: 7_I thought she was some weird bald chick . I mean , you know , that girl has got hair all over her head !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Well , maybe it will not work out . Maybe Ross will not like her personality .
